name: Apple Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 large Cooking apple, pared and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Spread butter on bread slices.
3. Cut each slice into 1-inch cubes.
4. Place half of the bread cubes in a greased shallow 2-quart baking dish.
5. Top with half of the chopped apples.
6. Repeat layers, using remaining bread cubes and chopped apple.
7. In a large bowl, lightly beat milk, eggs, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt.
8. Pour mixture over bread and apples in dish.
9. Bake for 1 hour or until a knife inserted 1-inch from the edge of the dish comes out clean.
10. Optionally, add 1/2 cup nuts or raisins to the dish before baking.
